title: BingX is going live soon to unveil their AI strategy — worth keeping an eye on
author: thienpro2
selftext:
In a few hours, BingX will go live to introduce how they plan to integrate AI into crypto trading. While details are still under wraps, the teaser suggests a major shift in how traders interact with data and make decisions.

With AI becoming a key trend across industries, it’ll be interesting to see how BingX positions itself in the evolving landscape.  
\#BingXKeynote #BingXAIEvolution #CryptoAI
